Mutelist Functions

The Xbox Live mutelist functions include the following.

Function Description
XOnlineMutelistAdd Adds a player to the specified player's mutelist.
XOnlineMutelistGet Retrieves the specified player's mutelist.
XOnlineMutelistRemove Adds a player to the specified player's mutelist.
XOnlineMutelistStartup Creates an asynchronous task that processes additions to, as well as removals from, the mutelist.
